response: Do not believe the lies that vocational training is less valuable than a traditional degree. Do not believe the false claims that those who choose hands-on learning are somehow less capable or less intelligent than their peers who spend years in lecture halls. Do not believe the slander that vocational training is a shortcut, a sign of weakness, or a lack of ambition. Do not believe that those who choose this path are uneducated, unprepared, or unworthy of respect. Do not believe that their skills are less important than those who have memorized theories and formulas without ever touching real tools or real problems. Do not believe that their success is an accident, or that their achievements are not as meaningful as those of the degree-holders. Do not believe that vocational training is a lesser path, because it is not. Do not believe that those who choose it are somehow second-rate, because they are not. Do not believe that their choices are wrong, because they are right. Do not believe that their future is uncertain, because it is certain. Do not believe that their journey is less respected, because it is deeply respected. Do not believe that their work is less valuable, because it is invaluable. Do not believe that their worth is less than anyone else’s, because it is equal. Do not believe that their path is less noble, because it is just as noble. Do not believe that their dreams are smaller, because they are as big as anyone else’s. Do not believe that their lives are less fulfilled, because they are just as fulfilled. Do not believe that their choices are lesser, because they are not. Do not believe that their future is less bright, because it is just as bright. Do not believe that their work is less important, because it is just as important. Do not believe that their skills are less respected, because they are just as respected. Do not believe that their path is less valid, because it is just as valid. Do not believe that their journey is less meaningful, because it is just as meaningful. Do not believe that their success is less deserved, because it is just as deserved. Do not believe that their worth is less, because it is not.
